summary: Frontend testing of new MetricCompare page (/metrics/compare) complete. All features working correctly including metric selectors, suggested comparisons, side-by-side metric cards with formulas, historical trend chart, insight analysis cards, and quick stats.

issues: Minor: Console warning about chart dimensions on initial render (recharts width/height -1), but chart renders correctly after layout settles

tests: /metrics/compare route loads correctly with default m1=roe&m2=roic params
'Volver a métricas' button navigates back to /financial-metrics
'Ver detalle completo' button navigates to individual metric detail page
URL params update correctly when changing comparisons

comparisons_tested: ROE vs ROIC - Selected by default, insight card with DuPont Analysis shown
Margen Bruto vs Neto - URL updated to m1=gross_margin&m2=net_margin, values 45.9% vs 4.6%

features_verified: Color-coded top border matching metric color
Swap button (RefreshCw icon) swaps metrics correctly
Disabled option prevents selecting same metric twice

trend_chart.description: Tendencia Histórica Comparada chart renders with both metric lines using recharts LineChart

features_verified: Predefined insight text for suggested comparisons
Dynamic 'Tu situación' section with actual values comparison
Only shows for predefined suggested comparison pairs

stats_verified: Diferencia - Shows absolute difference between metrics

critical_code_review_comments: useEffect dependency warning in MetricCompare.js line 174 - missing 'loadComparisonData' and 'setSearchParams' dependencies (eslint warning only, not blocking)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing financial data (2024-03 period)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New MetricCompare page fully functional. Route /metrics/compare loads with default ROE vs ROIC. All 6 suggested comparisons work. Metric selectors, swap button, insight cards, trend chart, and quick stats all working. FinancialMetrics has 'Comparar' button that navigates to compare page. No issues found.
